intended_use: OncoStudio provides deep-learning-based automatic contouring to organs at risk in DICOM-RT format from CT images. This software could be used as an initial contouring for the clinicians to be confirme
intended_use_full: OncoStudio provides deep-learning-based automatic contouring to organs at risk in DICOM-RT format from CT images. This software could be used as an initial contouring for the clinicians to be confirmed by the radiation oncology department for treatment planning or other professions where a segmented mask of organs is needed.
target_condition: Radiation therapy treatment planning requiring organ at risk delineation
ground_truth: Ground truth segmentations established by three radiation oncologists following RTOG and international clinical guidelines through manual annotation and sequential editing/confirmation process
other_metrics: Mean Dice coefficient (DSC) for structures in each anatomical region (Head & Neck, Thorax, Abdomen, and Pelvis) evaluated against established criteria
